text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That comes to an even seven! The question is, of
what?!
choice_data_list: The number of watermelons you split at camp.

The number of cicada shells you collected at
camp.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The answer is the number of fancy-schmancy
brooches in McQueen's collection!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That has nothing to do with summer camp,
though!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You know the drill! As punishment for answering
incorrectly, you have to walk back to the
academy! Bye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make a beeline for the bus before it gets a
chance to leave me behind.
